summary: Frontend-only verification of redesigned CookieBanner (compact floating card bottom-right) and simplified FooterExtras (single row, no ATLAS/devos/v1.0). 13/13 specified checks PASS in both light and dark themes. Web bundle confirmed serving main.c99e537a.js. POST /api/cookie-consent returns 200 for all three flows (accept-all, rejected, essential). No deprecated Expo packages detected in the touched files (CookieBanner.js, FooterExtras.js are pure web/React, not RN).
critical_code_review_comments: CookieBanner.js (245 LOC) and FooterExtras.js (143 LOC) both well under the 700-line threshold and contained.

Note: when localStorage cookie_consent_v1 already exists the API POST is skipped (banner doesn't appear). This is correct UX but means re-tests must clear localStorage first — verified in test script.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Banner appears only when localStorage 'cookie_consent_v1' is empty — clear it via page.evaluate before each scenario. Dark theme is triggered by setting localStorage.theme='dark' before reload (NOT via ?theme=dark query param). All cookie testIDs: cookie-banner, -dismiss, -customize, -essential (Reject btn), -accept-all, -cat-{essential|functional|analytics|marketing}, -save, -policy-link. Footer testIDs: footer-extras, footer-socials, footer-legal-links, footer-legal-{terms|privacy|cookies}, footer-copyright. Reject button uses testID 'cookie-banner-essential' (sends choice:'rejected'), which is mildly confusing naming but matches review_request spec.
rca_of_issue: N/A — verification task, no bugs found.
verified_checks: Banner rect: w=420, right_gap=20, bottom_gap=20 (floating card, not full-width)
All required testIDs present: dismiss, customize, essential(Reject), accept-all, policy-link
Customize expands to 4 categories + Save (cat-essential disabled/locked)
Accept all -> POST {choice:'all', categories:['functional','analytics','marketing']} -> 200, banner hides, localStorage set
Footer is single row (footer-extras own borderTopWidth = 0px, no inner divider)
Footer contains: footer-socials (left), footer-legal-links (right) with terms/privacy/cookies + footer-copyright '© 2026'
Text 'ATLAS', 'devos', 'v1.0', 'operational' fully absent from footer DOM
footer-legal-terms opens legal-modal-terms; footer-legal-cookies opens legal-modal-cookies
Dark theme: banner bg = rgb(15, 20, 29) matches spec; footer renders correctly on dark body (rgb(15,15,17))
Light theme: banner bg = white (#ffffff), all elements visible and styled
